sub_pixel_system.notes: Not documented. Billiards simulation with cue ball physics.

special_mechanics.name: Cue Ball Physics
special_mechanics.description: Billiards simulation with ball pocketing mechanics. Player can apply spin (english) to the cue ball.

special_mechanics.name: Trick Shot Mode
special_mechanics.description: Challenge mode requiring the player to pot all balls into select pockets using a single shot.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - This is a billiards/pool simulation game, not a platformer or action game with traditional character movement. The available Wikipedia source contains only gameplay mode descriptions, level information, and port details. No quantitative movement physics parameters, gravity values, jump mechanics, or sub-pixel system data are documented. The game focuses on cue ball physics simulation rather than player character movement mechanics.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Side Pocket article (gameplay section only)
